neighbors.name: James Allen Massey & Debbie E. Massey
neighbors.claims: Polk County property records list James Allen Massey and Debbie E. Massey as owners of land parcels in the county ([source](https://polkga.org/departments/tax_assessor/index.php)). There is no public record of James or Debbie Massey voicing any opinions on development in Polk County; their names do not appear in local news archives or county meeting minutes in recent years ([source](https://apnews.com/search?query=%22James%20Massey%22%20Polk%20County%20GA)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach via a personable, local contact to build rapport and listen to any concerns about property impacts, given their lack of a stated stance.

neighbors.name: Kaysie Taylor & Heather Dawn Holder
neighbors.claims: Kaysie Taylor and Heather Dawn Holder are listed as owners of a Polk County property ([source](https://polkga.org/departments/tax_assessor/index.php)). A public records directory indicates a Kaysie Taylor resides in Aragon, Georgia, which is located in Polk County ([source](https://nationalpublicdata.com/people/t/kaysie-taylor/)). The draft claim regarding employment as an X-ray technologist could not be verified and has been removed. There are no public reports indicating that either Taylor or Holder has taken a public position on local development issues ([source](https://coosavalleynews.com)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage with an open, informative approach to answer questions and gauge any concerns, as neither co-owner has shown prior involvement in community development debates.
